name: Lynn Hope
abstract: Lynn Hope, also known as El Hajj Abdullah Rasheed Ahmad, (September 26, 1926 – February 24, 1993) was an American jazz and blues tenor saxophonist. He was born in Birmingham, Alabama, United States.

concerts.label: Midnight Performance: Pittsburgh Courier Charity Fund's 7th Annual Concert

about_quotes.speaker: Dawoud Sabu Adeyola
about_quotes.evidence: Even Kenny Clarke. Kenny Clarke when his book, his autobiography came out it had Kenny Clarke and then his Muslim name underneath it, I think it was Ali, something like that.
